'''dazhubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squandamania|squandamania]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squandamania|squandamania]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dazhubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzhibith|dæzhibith]] || [[word:dæzhibij|dæzhibij]] || [[word:dæzhibish|dæzhibish]] || [[word:dæzhibi|dæzhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhuzhubuth|dazhuzhubuth]] || [[word:dazhuzhubuj|dazhuzhubuj]] || [[word:dazhuzhubush|dazhuzhubush]] || [[word:dazhuzhubu|dazhuzhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhubuth|dazhubuth]] || [[word:dazhubuj|dazhubuj]] || [[word:dazhubush|dazhubush]] || [[word:dazhubu|dazhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhufbuth|dazhufbuth]] || [[word:dazhufbuj|dazhufbuj]] || [[word:dazhufbush|dazhufbush]] || [[word:dazhufbuf|dazhufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazhubuthu|dazhubuthu]] || [[word:dazhubuju|dazhubuju]] || [[word:dazhubushu|dazhubushu]] || [[word:dazhubuku|dazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazhubuth|dazhubuth]] || [[word:dazhubuj|dazhubuj]] || [[word:dazhubush|dazhubush]] || [[word:dazhubu|dazhubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazhubuthul|dazhubuthul]] || [[word:dazhubujul|dazhubujul]] || [[word:dazhubushul|dazhubushul]] || [[word:dazhubukul|dazhubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazhubuthuthu|dazhubuthuthu]] || [[word:dazhubujuju|dazhubujuju]] || [[word:dazhubushushu|dazhubushushu]] || [[word:dazhubuku|dazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazhubuthun|dazhubuthun]] || [[word:dazhubujun|dazhubujun]] || [[word:dazhubushun|dazhubushun]] || [[word:dazhubukun|dazhubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazhubuthuoro|dazhubuthuoro]] || [[word:dazhubujuoro|dazhubujuoro]] || [[word:dazhubushuoro|dazhubushuoro]] || [[word:dazhubukuoro|dazhubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
